name: Contractor & Home Services
tagline: The shows roofing and HVAC operators actually run on.
display_description: The operations-and-growth shows that the best roofing, HVAC, and home-services owners listen to — pricing, hiring, dispatch, close rates. PA follows all eight, transcribes each new episode, and files the tactics into your voice influences so the playbook lands in your brain without you putting in earbuds.

shows.title: The Roofer Show
shows.why: Roofing business owners on pricing, sales, and running the crew.

shows.title: Roofing Success
shows.why: Marketing and growth interviews with roofing operators.

shows.title: HVAC School - For Techs, By Techs
shows.why: The trade-standard HVAC show — technical and business both.

shows.title: The Successful Contractor
shows.why: Operations and management for the trades, by CertainPath.

shows.title: Contractor Evolution
shows.why: Systems and scale for contracting businesses past the owner-operator stage.

shows.title: The Wealthy Contractor
shows.why: Sales, marketing, and mindset for home-improvement owners.

shows.title: Service Business Mastery
shows.why: HVAC, plumbing, and electrical business operations and tech.

shows.title: Waste No Day
shows.why: Home-services sales and motivation — in-home close rates and tickets.
